title: Réseau neuronal animé
description: Réseau 3 couches (1 input, 3 hidden, 3 output) — arêtes courbes Bézier + paquets (circles) animés via <animateMotion> sur chaque chemin.

render.svg:
<svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 300 140" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
  {{#each edges as |e|}}
    <path class="edge" d="{{e.d}}" />
  {{/each}}
  {{#each edges as |e|}}{{#if e.packetSize > 0}}
    <circle class="packet" r="{{e.packetSize}}">
      <animateMotion dur="{{e.duration}}" repeatCount="indefinite" {{#if e.delay}}begin="{{e.delay}}"{{/if}} path="{{e.d}}" />
    </circle>
  {{/if}}{{/each}}
  {{#each nodes as |n|}}
    <circle class="node" cx="{{n.cx}}" cy="{{n.cy}}" r="{{n.r}}" />
  {{/each}}
</svg>
